{{CargoRelic
|name=Peace of Prague
|class_id=22401
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=07-03
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.25%)
|description=On 23 August 1866, Austria AD, which suffered a devastating defeat in the war, signed the Peace of Prague with Prussia.<br>Prussia sent troops to Holstein, Austria, to unify Germany, which triggered the seven-week-long war. The Prussian army won a major victory, and Prime Minister Bismarck's decision led to a lenient peace agreement with Austria. This agreement allowed Prussia to gain a lot of land while also maintaining good relations with Austria. It provided a favorable environment for Prussia to achieve the ultimate goal of German unification.
|fame=46
|art=22
|fth=23
|civ=29
|tech=34
|ss1=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +1
|ss2=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +2
|ss3=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +3
|ss4=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +5
|ss7=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +5<br>Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Wind DMG +10
}}
